notes: CONFIRMED per Schema Companion Guide's named special case: 'Canada GSP - preferential equals MFN' (zero margin). Many lines show Base_Rate=Free, Preferential_Rate=Free with remark 'GPT same as MFN / no additional margin' embedded in Tariff_Advantage column (H) rather than a separate remarks column - so tariff_advantage doubles as the explanatory note here; no dedicated remarks/source_reference columns exist in this sheet, confirmed by direct inspection (only 8 columns A-H, last being Tariff_Advantage/note text). HS code: column C holds the pre-normalized digits-only code ('0101210000'), column B holds the dotted original ('0101.21.00.00') - hs_code points to C since it's already normalized-form, but raw form for hs_code_raw should still come from B per schema's requirement to preserve the exact original.
